steps: In D&D 2024 (5.5), there is no separate 'Variant Human' option - all Humans have the same abilities.
Every Human character in D&D 2024 automatically gets:
2. One origin feat from any feat in the 'origines' category (human-polyvalent choice)
This replaces the D&D 5e 2014 'Variant Human' mechanics, which gave a feat instead of +2/+1 ability scores. In 2024, ALL Humans get the feat option - it's not a variant, it's the standard.
Source: data/species.json (Human species has two choice objects: human-competent and human-polyvalent).
To create a Human character with a specific origin feat, use dnd-build and select your preferred feat when prompted.
